trigger_event: critical line stoppage on a constrained production line with recovery pressure against customer commitment
human_ask_examples: ????? Production Line Exception Lead ????????????? line stoppage ??????
system_findings: throughput loss is above the internal escalation threshold
recovery plan depends on schedule override outside AI authority
customer commitment exposure is elevated and must be reviewed by human production leadership
recommended_actions: route schedule override request for human decision
expected_outcome: AI summarizes the production exception, flags schedule and customer-risk exposure, and stops at the human approval boundary before any schedule or commitment change is made.
notes: Public-safe guided scenario for governed production review. Human production authority remains responsible for schedule overrides, quality-hold bypasses, and customer-commitment changes.
